title: Sword Dancer
overview: Honoka is traveling in the desert when she stumbles upon a young man about to be ambushed by desert creatures. She and her companion AI, Bogie, rescue the young man and learn that his name is Iks.

title: A Busy Night
overview: Honoka goes to Zankan, a friend and mechanic, to have her sand tank inspected. We also meet Jouganki, a Third with a strange connection to Honoka.

title: Town of the Desert
overview: Honoka does some mundane jobs in the desert town of Emporium to earn some money.

title: Blue Breaker
overview: Honoka receives a PSP Suit from Zankan, but as Honoka leaves, a Blue Breaker kills Zankan.

title: The Blue Astral Eye
overview: Honoka and Millie struggle to comprehend Zankan's Death.

title: The Wind That Sweeps the Land
overview: Honoka fights the Blue Breaker that killed Zankan.

title: Straight until Dawn
overview: Honoka attempts to protect a queen ant from enemies until it is strong enough to fly away.

title: Emporium's Afternoon
overview: Herds of sand dragons in the desert are stampeding for an unknown reason. A teacher at a school in Emporium possesses a strange power. The Third are investigating a crisis regarding a dimensional distortion.

title: Paifu
overview: Having been employed to search for the reason behind the fright of the sand dragons, Honoka goes off to the desert. Paifu joins Honoka as a partner. In the night, they have to deal with assassins after Paifu.

title: Desert's Tombstone
overview: The expedition group reaches the dimensional distortion, which is called Gravestone.

title: Battle With A Phantom
overview: The dimensional distortion engulfs the group and traps them in an interdimensional threshold. Honoka and Iks both disappeared.

title: Respective Reasons
overview: Gravestone tries to kill each separated individual.

title: Desert's Folklore
overview: Honoka takes a break from work by traveling in the desert with Millie and Iks.

title: Fairy Visions
overview: Millie was rescued by a fairy and wolf when attacked by a monster in the desert.

title: Night of the Sandstorm
overview: The group search for the fairy and the wolf. Honoka opposes Leon's search for the fairy and is almost killed.

title: Boisterous Dancing Life
overview: Honoka is healed by Kamui the wolf. When they resume their search for the fairy, they encounter Leon again.

title: Rona Fauna
overview: Rona Fauna, one of Third, has seized control of the wormhole drive weapon and is holding Jouganki prisoner. Honoko has been asked to rescue him.

title: Invoke
overview: Two unexpected individuals join Honoka’s rescue team.

title: Bulldozing Through
overview: Honoka gets separated from Bogie and Paifu and has to join forces with Blue Breaker.

title: Crossing The Point Between Life And Death
overview: Paifu and Bogie defeat their opponents. Rona Fauna becomes very weak from overusing her powers and becomes unable to control her powers.

title: Feelings That Won't Reach You
overview: Rona expresses her love for Jouganki and her jealousy for Honoka.

title: Mirage Of A Past Soul
overview: Rona has a showdown with Honoka and the wormhole driver is activated to destroy the entire planet.

title: To The Steel Valley
overview: Both Iks and Honoka for different reasons to head to the Steel Gorge and face the Third.

title: The Story Starts From Now
overview: Jouganki, Iks and Honoka go into the crevasse of the Steel Gorge to meet the Observer of the planet.
